findings.evidence: Lines 54-55 and 66-67 prove the first two lemmas solely by rewriting `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv_symm_apply` then existing lemmas at SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:172 and :209; lines 79-80, 93-94, 135-136, and 149-150 then only apply those wrappers plus `rfl` for `QuotientGroup.quotientBot`.
findings.fix: Remove these wrappers or replace them with local `simp`/rewrites from `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv_symm_apply`, `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup_apply_inv_smul`, `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup_apply_smul`, their regular versions, and `QuotientGroup.quotientBot`.
findings.issue: The eight lemmas in this file are bottom-specialized wrappers around existing quotient-group API, creating parallel API for the same facts.

summary: Most of the generic bottom-orbit API is not already present, but the new deck quotient-group compatibility lemmas duplicate existing general subgroup-quotient lemmas specialized to `⊥`. Keep the bottom equivalence API, but avoid adding parallel names for statements already obtained by one rewrite plus `QuotientGroup.quotientBot`.
